Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 757}I asked her what all those papers and paintings mean...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 757}And she started spouting all this nonsense... It sounded like a lecture or something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 757}I believe in the Deliverance and the End and all that, but I still can't follow what she's saying...[n]{f 1 1}
